stories.title: Database Migration for Reviews Table
stories.description: Create SQL migration files for reviews table with proper indexes and constraints
acceptanceCriteria: Migration file 0042_create_reviews_table.up.sql exists at adapter/db/migration/
Migration file 0042_create_reviews_table.down.sql exists at adapter/db/migration/
Table has columns: id (UUID), business_id (UUID), helper_id (UUID), category_id (uint), rate (int), review (text), service_type (varchar), timestamps, deleted_at
Table has indexes: idx_reviews_business_id, idx_reviews_helper_id, idx_reviews_deleted_at
Table has unique index idx_reviews_unique_active on (business_id, helper_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

stories.title: Review Domain Entity and DTOs
stories.description: Create Review entity and request/response DTOs following existing patterns
acceptanceCriteria: core/domain/review.entity.go exists with Review struct
Review entity has fields: ID, BusinessID, HelperID, CategoryID, Rate, Review, ServiceType, CreatedAt, DeletedAt
core/domain/review.request.dto.go exists with CreateReviewRequestDTO
core/domain/review.response.dto.go exists with ReviewListResponseDTO
CreateReviewRequestDTO has HelperID, Rate, Review, ServiceType fields
ReviewListResponseDTO has Rate, Review, ServiceType, CreatedAt fields

stories.title: Review Interfaces Layer
stories.description: Create repository, service, and controller interfaces for review module
acceptanceCriteria: core/interfaces/review/IReviewRepository.go exists
core/interfaces/review/IReviewService.go exists
core/interfaces/review/IReviewController.go exists
IReviewRepository has methods: Create, ListByBusiness, ListByHelper, GetByBusinessAndHelper
IReviewService has methods: CreateReview, ListBusinessReviews, ListHelperReviews
IReviewController has methods: Create, ListBusiness, ListHelper

stories.title: Review Repository Implementation
stories.description: Implement review repository with GORM following existing patterns
acceptanceCriteria: adapter/db/repository/review.repository.go exists
Repository implements IReviewRepository interface
Create method uses transaction and handles soft deletes
ListByBusiness returns reviews filtered by business_id
ListByHelper returns reviews filtered by helper_id
GetByBusinessAndHelper checks for existing review

stories.title: Review Service and Controller
stories.description: Implement review service with business logic and controller with Swagger docs
acceptanceCriteria: modules/review/review.service.go exists
modules/review/review.controller.go exists
Service validates proposal is finished before creating review
Service prevents duplicate reviews
Service validates business user cannot review themselves
Controller has Swagger annotations for all endpoints
Controller maps errors to correct HTTP status codes

stories.title: Review Module Tests
stories.description: Create unit tests for review service and controller with 60%+ coverage
acceptanceCriteria: modules/review/review.service_test.go exists
modules/review/review.controller_test.go exists
Tests cover successful review creation
Tests cover proposal not finished error case
Tests cover duplicate review error case
Tests cover non-business user error case
Test coverage is >= 60% for review module

stories.title: Router and Dependency Injection
stories.description: Integrate review module into router and main.go dependency injection
acceptanceCriteria: adapter/http/router.go updated with review controller dependency
adapter/http/router.go has /review route group with POST, GET /business, GET /helper
app/main.go has review repository, service, controller initialization
app/main.go injects review controller into router
core/utils/constants.go has review-specific errors

stories.title: User Profile Integration and Swagger
stories.description: Update user response DTO and generate Swagger documentation
acceptanceCriteria: core/domain/user.response.dto.go updated with Reviews field type changed to []ReviewListResponseDTO
GET /user/profile/:id returns reviews in response for helper users
Swagger documentation generated at /swagger
All review endpoints visible in Swagger UI
swag init -g app/main.go runs without errors
